description: The AI evaluates 100% of interactions using Dynamics 365 Quality Management — surfacing BSA/AML compliance gaps, repeat contact drivers, and top-performer burnout signals before they become regulatory or retention issues.
Ask a plain-language question and receive a sourced answer drawn simultaneously from Dynamics 365 Quality Management, Process Adherence, Sentiment Analysis, CRM member records, and IT incident logs.

From the same conversation, push script updates to Dynamics 365 agent desktops, auto-resolve compliance backlogs against CRM records, file incident reports, and send agent coaching notifications — all without leaving the AI interface.

The AI flags unusual patterns that Dynamics 365 cannot surface alone — BSA/AML skip rates correlated with script version changes, repeat contact spikes correlated with IT outages, top-performer decline correlated with call complexity load.
